# GateHouse React Renderer

React-specific implementation patterns for the GateHouse renderer. All components consume design tokens via CSS variables and Tailwind utility classes.

## Token Consumption

Design tokens from [design-tokens.md](design-tokens.md) are implemented as CSS custom properties:

```css
/* Generated by the renderer from app.yaml theme config */
:root {
  --color-primary-50: #eff6ff;
  --color-primary-600: #1e40af;  /* seed */
  --color-primary-700: #1d4ed8;
  /* ... full palette generated */

  --space-1: 4px;
  --space-2: 8px;
  /* ... density-scaled */

  --radius-md: 6px;
  --radius-lg: 8px;
  /* ... from border_radius setting */

  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  --font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
}
```

### Tailwind Integration

Tailwind config maps tokens to utility classes:

```js
// tailwind.config.ts — generated
module.exports = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        primary: {
          50: 'var(--color-primary-50)',
          600: 'var(--color-primary-600)',
          // ...
        },
        danger: { /* ... */ },
        success: { /* ... */ },
      },
      spacing: {
        'gh-1': 'var(--space-1)',
        'gh-2': 'var(--space-2)',
        // ...
      },
      borderRadius: {
        'gh-md': 'var(--radius-md)',
        'gh-lg': 'var(--radius-lg)',
      },
    },
  },
}
```

**Convention**: Use Tailwind classes in templates, never raw CSS values.

```tsx
// ✅ Correct
<button className="bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 rounded-gh-md px-gh-4 py-gh-2">

// ❌ Wrong — hardcoded values
<button style={{ backgroundColor: '#1E40AF', borderRadius: '6px' }}>
```

## Component Architecture

### File Structure Convention

Every renderer component follows this structure:

```tsx
// 1. Imports — React, libraries, sibling components, types
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import type { EntityListProps } from './types';

// 2. Props interface (for runtime components) or template context (for generated)
interface Props {
  // Derived from ComponentNode.Props
}

// 3. Component
export function EntityList({ entity, columns, filters }: Props) {
  // 3a. Hooks (data fetching, permissions, state)
  // 3b. Derived/computed values (useMemo)
  // 3c. Event handlers
  // 3d. Render
}

// 4. Sub-components (if small, co-located; otherwise separate file)
```

### Runtime vs Generated Components

**Runtime components** (serve mode): Receive props from the JSON spec tree at runtime. Must handle all variations dynamically.

```tsx
// Runtime: interprets spec at runtime
export function DynamicField({ field, value, onChange }: DynamicFieldProps) {
  switch (field.type) {
    case 'string': return <StringField {...field} value={value} onChange={onChange} />;
    case 'enum': return <EnumField {...field} value={value} onChange={onChange} />;
    // ...
  }
}
```

**Generated components** (generate mode): Props are baked in at generation time via Go templates. The output is static, type-safe code.

```go-template
{{/* Template produces a specific component, not a dynamic one */}}
export function SubcontractorCreate() {
  const form = useForm<SubcontractorCreateInput>({
    resolver: zodResolver(schema),
  });
  return (
    <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)}>
      {{- range fieldsForCreate .Entity }}
      {{ templateCall (printf "field_%s" .Type) . }}
      {{- end }}
    </form>
  );
}
```

## Data Fetching Patterns

All data fetching uses TanStack Query (React Query).

### List Hook Pattern

```tsx
export function useEntityList(
  resource: string,
  params: ListParams
) {
  return useQuery({
    queryKey: [resource, params],
    queryFn: () => apiClient.get(resource, { params }),
    placeholderData: keepPreviousData,
  });
}
```

### Detail Hook Pattern

```tsx
export function useEntityDetail(resource: string, id: string, includes?: string[]) {
  return useQuery({
    queryKey: [resource, id, includes],
    queryFn: () => apiClient.get(`${resource}/${id}`, {
      params: includes ? { include: includes.join(',') } : undefined,
    }),
    enabled: !!id,
  });
}
```

### Mutation Hook Pattern

```tsx
export function useEntityMutation(resource: string) {
  const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  return {
    create: useMutation({
      mutationFn: (data) => apiClient.post(resource, data),
      onSuccess: () => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [resource] }),
    }),
    update: useMutation({
      mutationFn: ({ id, data }) => apiClient.patch(`${resource}/${id}`, data),
      onSuccess: (_, { id }) => {
        queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [resource, id] });
        queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [resource] });
      },
    }),
    transition: useMutation({
      mutationFn: ({ id, action, data }) =>
        apiClient.post(`${resource}/${id}/${action}`, data),
      onSuccess: (_, { id }) => {
        queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [resource, id] });
        queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [resource] });
      },
    }),
  };
}
```

## Form Patterns

Forms use react-hook-form with zod schemas generated from the YAML field definitions.

### Validation Schema Generation

From YAML field constraints:

```tsx
// Generated from entity field definitions
const schema = z.object({
  company_name: z.string().min(2).max(200),
  tax_id: z.string().regex(/^\d{2}-\d{7}$/, 'Must be in format XX-XXXXXXX'),
  email: z.string().email(),
  trade_codes: z.array(z.string()).min(1, 'At least one trade required'),
  insurance_expiry_date: z.string().optional().refine(
    (v) => !v || new Date(v) > new Date(),
    'Must be a future date'
  ),
});
```

### Form Field Rendering Order

1. Check `show_in.create` or `show_in.edit` (from YAML)
2. Skip `hidden`, `computed`, `generated` fields
3. For `immutable` fields in edit mode: render as display, not input
4. Group by `sections` or `steps` from YAML view config
5. Render each field using the appropriate `field_{type}` component

## State Transition UI Pattern

```tsx
function TransitionButton({ transition, record, entity }: TransitionButtonProps) {
  const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
  const { transition: doTransition } = useEntityMutation(entity.apiResource);

  // Guard check — disable button and show reason
  const guardResult = evaluateGuards(transition.guards, record);

  return (
    <>
      <button
        onClick={() => setShowConfirm(true)}
        disabled={!guardResult.passed}
        title={guardResult.message}
        className={cn(
          'inline-flex items-center gap-gh-2 px-gh-4 py-gh-2 rounded-gh-md',
          `bg-${transition.color}-600 hover:bg-${transition.color}-700 text-white`,
          'disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed'
        )}
      >
        <Icon name={transition.icon} size={16} />
        {transition.label}
      </button>

      {showConfirm && (
        <ConfirmDialog
          {...transition.confirmation}
          record={record}
          onConfirm={(formData) => {
            doTransition.mutate({
              id: record.id,
              action: transition.name,
              data: formData,
            });
          }}
          onCancel={() => setShowConfirm(false)}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}
```

## Responsive Implementation

Responsive rules from the YAML `responsive` block are implemented via Tailwind breakpoints:

```tsx
// YAML responsive rule: < mobile → entity_list layout: cards
// Implemented as:

<div className="hidden md:block">
  <DataTable ... />    {/* Table on tablet+ */}
</div>
<div className="block md:hidden">
  <CardList ... />     {/* Cards on mobile */}
</div>
```

Breakpoint mapping from YAML to Tailwind:

| YAML breakpoint | Tailwind prefix | Default value |
|---|---|---|
| `mobile` | `sm:` | 640px |
| `tablet` | `md:` | 1024px |
| `desktop` | `lg:` | 1280px |
| `wide` | `xl:` | 1536px |

## Key Library Choices

| Concern | Library | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| Data fetching | `@tanstack/react-query` | Cache, optimistic updates, background refresh |
| Tables | `@tanstack/react-table` | Headless, sorting, filtering, selection |
| Forms | `react-hook-form` + `zod` | Performance, schema validation |
| Routing | `react-router-dom` v6 | Nested routes, loaders |
| Charts | `recharts` | Composable, responsive |
| Rich text | `@tiptap/react` | Extensible, collaborative-ready |
| Date picker | `react-day-picker` | Lightweight, accessible |
| UI primitives | `@radix-ui/react-*` | Headless, accessible |
| Icons | `lucide-react` | Matches YAML icon names directly |
| Styling | `tailwindcss` + `clsx` + `tailwind-merge` | Token-based, composable |
